[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 111111110 8
2 101001101 5
3 101011010 5
4 100110110 5
5 101111111 8
6 111010101 6
7 111111101 8
